query:
-- Creative Artists table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS creative_artists (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  fullName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  stageName VARCHAR(255),
  email VARCHAR(320),
  phone VARCHAR(50),
  artistType ENUM('performer', 'producer', 'designer', 'animator', 'hybrid') NOT NULL,
  primaryEntity ENUM('real_eye_nation', 'laws_collective', 'both') DEFAULT 'real_eye_nation' NOT NULL,
  specializations JSON,
  familyMemberId INT,
  houseId VARCHAR(50),
  specialistTrackId INT,
  status ENUM('applicant', 'trainee', 'active', 'senior', 'master', 'emeritus', 'inactive') DEFAULT 'applicant' NOT NULL,
  experienceLevel ENUM('entry', 'intermediate', 'advanced', 'expert', 'master') DEFAULT 'entry' NOT NULL,
  businessFundamentalsCompleted BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  financialLiteracyCompleted BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  ipLicensingTrainingCompleted BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  portfolioUrl TEXT,
  demoReelUrl TEXT,
  bio TEXT,
  contractType ENUM('employee', 'contractor', 'freelance', 'intern') DEFAULT 'contractor' NOT NULL,
  minimumGuarantee DECIMAL(10, 2),
  revenueSharePercentage DECIMAL(5, 2) DEFAULT 70.00,
  tokenBalance INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  lifetimeTokensEarned INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- Creative Productions table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS creative_productions (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  productionType ENUM('film', 'video', 'music_track', 'album', 'podcast', 'live_performance', 'theater_production', 'dance_piece', 'spoken_word', 'documentary', 'graphic_design', 'brand_identity', 'ui_ux_design', '3d_model', 'animation', 'motion_graphics', 'nft', 'digital_art', 'illustration', 'music_video', 'promotional_content', 'educational_content') NOT NULL,
  owningEntity ENUM('real_eye_nation', 'laws_collective', 'joint') NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  genre VARCHAR(100),
  duration INT,
  releaseDate TIMESTAMP,
  ipOwnership ENUM('artist_full', 'company_full', 'shared_majority_artist', 'shared_majority_company', 'work_for_hire') DEFAULT 'shared_majority_artist' NOT NULL,
  copyrightRegistered BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  copyrightNumber VARCHAR(100),
  licensingAvailable BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  licensingTypes JSON,
  status ENUM('in_development', 'in_production', 'post_production', 'completed', 'released', 'archived') DEFAULT 'in_development' NOT NULL,
  productionBudget DECIMAL(12, 2),
  totalRevenue DECIMAL(12, 2) DEFAULT 0.00,
  totalRoyaltiesPaid DECIMAL(12, 2) DEFAULT 0.00,
  primaryAssetUrl TEXT,
  thumbnailUrl TEXT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- Production Credits table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS production_credits (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  productionId INT NOT NULL,
  artistId INT NOT NULL,
  role VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  creditType ENUM('creator', 'performer', 'producer', 'director', 'writer', 'designer', 'animator', 'editor', 'composer', 'featured') NOT NULL,
  revenueSharePercentage DECIMAL(5, 2),
  flatFee DECIMAL(10, 2),
  flatFeePaid BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- Artist Revenue Streams table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS artist_revenue_streams (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  artistId INT NOT NULL,
  revenueType ENUM('royalty', 'performance_fee', 'teaching_fee', 'commission', 'licensing_fee', 'merchandise', 'streaming', 'sync_license', 'nft_sale', 'nft_royalty', 'grant', 'sponsorship') NOT NULL,
  productionId INT,
  bookingId INT,
  grossAmount DECIMAL(12, 2) NOT NULL,
  companyShare DECIMAL(12, 2) NOT NULL,
  artistShare DECIMAL(12, 2) NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('pending', 'approved', 'paid', 'disputed') DEFAULT 'pending' NOT NULL,
  paidAt TIMESTAMP,
  paymentMethod VARCHAR(100),
  paymentReference VARCHAR(255),
  description TEXT,
  periodStart TIMESTAMP,
  periodEnd TIMESTAMP,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- Design Projects table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS design_projects (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  projectName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  projectType ENUM('brand_identity', 'logo_design', 'marketing_materials', 'ui_ux_design', 'web_design', 'app_design', '3d_modeling', 'animation', 'motion_graphics', 'video_editing', 'photo_editing', 'illustration', 'infographic', 'presentation', 'packaging', 'merchandise_design', 'nft_collection', 'ai_assisted_design') NOT NULL,
  clientType ENUM('internal', 'external') DEFAULT 'internal' NOT NULL,
  clientEntityId INT,
  clientName VARCHAR(255),
  leadDesignerId INT,
  description TEXT,
  requirements TEXT,
  deliverables JSON,
  startDate TIMESTAMP,
  dueDate TIMESTAMP,
  completedDate TIMESTAMP,
  status ENUM('briefing', 'in_progress', 'review', 'revision', 'approved', 'delivered', 'archived') DEFAULT 'briefing' NOT NULL,
  projectBudget DECIMAL(10, 2),
  billingType ENUM('fixed', 'hourly', 'internal') DEFAULT 'internal' NOT NULL,
  hourlyRate DECIMAL(8, 2),
  hoursLogged DECIMAL(8, 2) DEFAULT 0.00,
  totalBilled DECIMAL(10, 2) DEFAULT 0.00,
  aiToolsUsed JSON,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- Design Assets table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS design_assets (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  assetName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  assetType ENUM('logo', 'icon', 'illustration', 'photo', 'video', 'animation', '3d_model', 'font', 'color_palette', 'template', 'mockup', 'source_file', 'export', 'nft') NOT NULL,
  projectId INT,
  productionId INT,
  creatorId INT,
  fileUrl TEXT NOT NULL,
  thumbnailUrl TEXT,
  fileFormat VARCHAR(50),
  fileSizeBytes INT,
  dimensions VARCHAR(50),
  description TEXT,
  tags JSON,
  colorPalette JSON,
  licenseType ENUM('internal_only', 'client_exclusive', 'royalty_free', 'rights_managed', 'creative_commons', 'nft_owned') DEFAULT 'internal_only' NOT NULL,
  isNft BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  nftContractAddress VARCHAR(255),
  nftTokenId VARCHAR(100),
  nftChain VARCHAR(50),
  version INT DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL,
  parentAssetId INT,
  status ENUM('draft', 'review', 'approved', 'archived') DEFAULT 'draft' NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- Creative Bookings table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS creative_bookings (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  bookingType ENUM('live_performance', 'recording_session', 'photo_shoot', 'video_shoot', 'workshop', 'teaching', 'consultation', 'design_session', 'event_appearance') NOT NULL,
  primaryArtistId INT NOT NULL,
  additionalArtists JSON,
  eventName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  eventDescription TEXT,
  locationType ENUM('in_person', 'virtual', 'hybrid') DEFAULT 'in_person' NOT NULL,
  venue VARCHAR(255),
  address TEXT,
  virtualLink TEXT,
  startDateTime TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  endDateTime TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  setupTime INT,
  clientType ENUM('internal', 'external') DEFAULT 'internal' NOT NULL,
  clientEntityId INT,
  clientName VARCHAR(255),
  clientContact VARCHAR(255),
  bookingFee DECIMAL(10, 2),
  depositAmount DECIMAL(10, 2),
  depositPaid BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  finalPaymentPaid BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('inquiry', 'pending', 'confirmed', 'in_progress', 'completed', 'cancelled') DEFAULT 'inquiry' NOT NULL,
  technicalRequirements TEXT,
  specialRequests TEXT,
  productionId INT,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- Creative Training Programs table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS creative_training_programs (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  programName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  programType ENUM('acting', 'voice_acting', 'music_performance', 'music_production', 'dance', 'spoken_word', 'theater', 'film_production', 'graphic_design', 'ui_ux', '3d_animation', 'motion_graphics', 'brand_development', 'digital_art', 'nft_creation', 'business_fundamentals', 'financial_literacy', 'ip_licensing', 'marketing_self', 'contract_negotiation') NOT NULL,
  owningEntity ENUM('real_eye_nation', 'laws_collective', 'academy') NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  learningObjectives JSON,
  prerequisitePrograms JSON,
  isBusinessFundamental BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  durationWeeks INT,
  hoursPerWeek INT,
  modules JSON,
  completionRequirements JSON,
  certificateAwarded BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE NOT NULL,
  completionTokenReward INT DEFAULT 100 NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('draft', 'active', 'archived') DEFAULT 'draft' NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

-- Artist Training Progress table
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS artist_training_progress (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  artistId INT NOT NULL,
  programId INT NOT NULL,
  status ENUM('enrolled', 'in_progress', 'completed', 'dropped') DEFAULT 'enrolled' NOT NULL,
  progressPercentage INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  moduleProgress JSON,
  enrolledAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  startedAt TIMESTAMP,
  completedAt TIMESTAMP,
  finalScore INT,
  certificateIssued BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE NOT NULL,
  certificateUrl TEXT,
  tokensAwarded INT DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
